title: プロ野球スピリッツA
subTitle: Sports/Baseball
desc:
Authorized by Nippon Professional Baseball. Konami Digital Entertainment/WBCI. ©2024 SAMURAI JAPAN. Getty Images. All other copyrights or trademarks are the property of their respective owners and are used under license.
---------------------------------------------
The definitive real-life professional baseball game is finally here!
Recreate the immersive atmosphere of professional baseball with the highest visual quality.
Aim to become the best team in Japan!
---------------------------------------------
◇Important Notice◇
- This app is an online game. Please enjoy it in an environment with internet connectivity.
- A total download of approximately 3.2GB is required to start the game and complete the tutorial.
- System Requirements
Supported OS: Android 7.0 or later
* Even on devices that meet the system requirements, the app may not function properly depending on the device's performance and specifications, device-specific app usage, etc.
* Devices with insufficient 3D rendering capabilities may experience unsatisfactory gameplay.
* The app may not function properly on devices capable of dual-screen display.
---------------------------------------------
[What is PRO YAKYU SPIRITS A?]
◇Realistic Professional Baseball Expressions
Pro baseball players appear in both live-action and lifelike 3D models! The excitement of the game is fully recreated with live commentary and cheering from the stands!
◇3D Action Baseball
In this intense 3D action baseball game, players' characteristics have a major impact on the outcome. Whether you're a skilled pitcher, a skilled pitcher, a skilled hitter, or a powerful hitter, use each player's unique strengths to lead your team to victory! For those less adept at action games, easy controls like "Zone Hitting" and "Automatic Pitching" are also included.
◇Real Professional Baseball Players Appear!!
Players based on actual professional baseball pennant performances are featured!
Here are the main players included for each team! (Titles omitted)
Yomiuri Giants
Hanshin Tigers
Yokohama DeNA Baystars
Hiroshima Toyo Carp
Tokyo Yakult Swallows
Chunichi Dragons
Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks
Hokkaido Nippon-Ham Fighters
Chiba Lotte Marines
Tohoku Rakuten Golden Eagles
Orix Buffaloes
Saitama Seibu Lions
---------------------------------------------
■ V Road ■
Compete against 12 teams from the Central and Pacific Leagues. Games progress automatically, and players are called upon during critical and opportunistic situations. Make game-deciding plays, rack up wins, and aim to become Japan's best!
■ League ■
Compete against rivals from across the country with the strongest lineup of acquired and strengthened players.
Leagues are held automatically every week, and promotions and relegations in league ranks are determined.
Strengthen your lineup and aim to win the Haoh League!
■ Player Development and Orders ■
Players level up through games! Unleash your full potential through special training and mastering special abilities! The combos you unleash depending on your player combinations can dramatically affect the outcome of the game! Aim for the top with the best team of the best players!
■ Real-Time Battles ■
New Feature! Battle against fierce opponents from around the country in Ranked Battles, or challenge your friends playing Pro Baseball Spirits A in Room Battles.
Enjoy online battles in two ways!
■ Pro Baseball News ■
A must-see for baseball fans, this is the place for carefully curated baseball news! Get pro baseball news and player stats, as well as game and pitch updates from official games!
---------------------------------------------
◆ Enjoy the best baseball game for free! ◆
Earn players through match rewards and more. Participate in match bonuses and various events for even more powerful player scouts. Steadily strengthen your team and build a formidable team, even for free. You can also check all baseball news for free on the Pro Baseball Spirits A app!
◆ "Pro Baseball Spirits A" is recommended for the following people ◆
・I want to create my dream team with only my favorite baseball players.
・I love the home video game "Pro Baseball Spirits" and want to enjoy "Pro Baseball Spirits" anytime, anywhere.
・I've never played the "Pro Baseball Spirits" series, but I'd like to try a realistic baseball game.
・I want to enjoy sports games with action elements.
・I'm looking for a baseball or sports game that's free to play and offers online battles.
・I'm looking for a baseball or sports game that I can spend a lot of time playing, even if it's free.
・I'm looking for a baseball or sports game where I can train players to my liking.
・I've played "Jikkyo Powerful Pro Baseball" and "Pro Baseball Dream Nine."
・I want to keep up with the latest baseball news while enjoying the game.
・I'm always on top of baseball news and live broadcasts.
・I want to fulfill my dream of becoming a sports player or manager through a sports game.
・I want to create my own original team with players from my favorite professional baseball teams.
・I want to recreate and play as players from my favorite professional baseball team in Pro Baseball Spirits.
・I want to play with friends who are also fans of professional baseball teams.
・When I was a child, I wanted to join a professional baseball team.
・My hobby is watching my favorite professional baseball team's games.
---------------------------------------------
◆About the "Cheering Song Usage License"
[Price and Renewal Frequency]
・Price: ¥480/month (tax included)
・Renewal Frequency: Monthly
[Service Details]
The following features will be available:
・Downloadable cheering songs
・Creating cheering songs
・Assigning cheering songs
・Playing assigned cheering songs during games
[About the Free Trial]
・You can try the free trial for 7 days from the start of use.
・If you do not cancel your subscription at least 24 hours before the end of the free trial period, your paid subscription will automatically begin.
・If you manually switch to the full version during the free trial period, any remaining free time will be forfeited.
[Automatic Renewal Details]
- If you do not cancel your subscription at least 24 hours before your next renewal date, your subscription period will automatically renew.
- If your subscription is automatically renewed, you will receive a receipt within 24 hours of the renewal date.
[How to Check Your Next Renewal Date and Cancel Your Subscription]
For information on checking your next renewal date and canceling your subscription, please refer to the Google Play Help page below.
How to Cancel, Pause, or Change Your Subscription on Google Play:
https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/7018481?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=ja
